import subprocess
import shlex
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/ping")
def ping_host():
    hostname = request.args.get("host", "localhost")
    safe_host = shlex.quote(hostname)
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["ping", "-c", "1", safe_host],
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    return {"output": result.stdout, "returncode": result.returncode}

@app.route("/search")
def search_files():
    pattern = request.args.get("q", "")
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["grep", "-r", pattern, "/data/"],
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
    )
    return {"matches": result.stdout}

def run_user_script(user_input: str):
    script_name = f"/scripts/{user_input}.py"
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        ["python", script_name],
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
    )
    stdout, _ = proc.communicate()
    return stdout.decode()
